zh.lifeSummary: 當Rene de la Chateaubriand於1440年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可a奧布利藍特時，他的父親Theaude de Chateaubriant21歲，母親Francoise de Hodart16歲。他於1463年與Helene d'Estouteville在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易勒 利-達朗斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rene de la Chateaubriand于1440年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可a奧布利藍特时，他的父亲Theaude de Chateaubriant21岁，母亲Francoise de Hodart16岁。他于1463年与Helene d'Estouteville在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易勒 利-達朗斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Rene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Late Latin name Renatus ‘reborn’, used by early Christians as a baptismal name celebrating spiritual rebirth in Christ. It is found in the English-speaking world, especially North America, where it is usually written without the accent. It occurs occasionally as a girl's name, presumably a modified spelling of Renée or a short form of Irene and similar names.

en.lifeSummary: When Rene de la Chateaubriand was born in 1440, in Châteaubriant, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Theaude de Chateaubriant, was 21 and his mother, Francoise de Hodart, was 16. He married Helene d'Estouteville in 1463, in Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1489, at the age of 49.

Il a épousé Helene d'Estouteville en 1463, à Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1489, à l’âge de 49 ans.

ko.Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays d: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 일 리오-드'아그르스

ko.lifeSummary: Rene de la Chateaubriand(이)가 1440년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 cha테오브리아트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Theaude de Chateaubriant(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Francoise de Hodart(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1463년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 일 리오-드'아그르스에서 Helene d'Estouteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Helene d'Estouteville в 1463 г. в местности л лион-д'ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1489 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

Se casó con Helene d'Estouteville en 1463, en Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1489, a la edad de 49 años.
